([Arabic](/wiki/Arabic_language "Arabic language"): منطقة القرداحة, [romanized](/wiki/Romanization_of_Arabic "Romanization of Arabic"): *[manṭiqat](/wiki/Mantiqah "Mantiqah") al-Qardāḥah*) is a [district](/wiki/Districts_of_Syria "Districts of Syria") of the [Latakia Governorate](/wiki/Latakia_Governorate "Latakia Governorate") in northwestern [Syria](/wiki/Syria "Syria"). [Administrative centre](/wiki/Administrative_centre "Administrative centre") is the city of [Qardaha](/wiki/Qardaha "Qardaha"). At the 2004 census, the district had a population of 75,279.[[1]](#cite_note-census2004-1)

**Qardaha District** ([Arabic](/wiki/Arabic_language "Arabic language"): منطقة القرداحة, [romanized](/wiki/Romanization_of_Arabic "Romanization of Arabic"): *[manṭiqat](/wiki/Mantiqah "Mantiqah") al-Qardāḥah*) is a [district](/wiki/Districts_of_Syria "Districts of Syria") of the [Latakia Governorate](/wiki/Latakia_Governorate "Latakia Governorate") in northwestern [Syria](/wiki/Syria "Syria"). [Administrative centre](/wiki/Administrative_centre "Administrative centre") is the city of [Qardaha](/wiki/Qardaha "Qardaha"). At the 2004 census, the district had a population of 75,279.[[1]](#cite_note-census2004-1)

## Sub-districts

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Qardaha_District&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Sub-districts")]

The district of Qardaha is divided into four sub-districts or [nawāḥī](/wiki/Nahiyah "Nahiyah") (population as of 2004[[1]](#cite_note-census2004-1)):

* [Qardaha Subdistrict](/wiki/Qardaha "Qardaha") (ناحية القرداحة): population 44,510[[2]](#cite_note-2)
* [Harf al-Musaytirah Subdistrict](/wiki/Harf_al-Musaytirah "Harf al-Musaytirah") (ناحية حرف المسيترة): population 6,669[[3]](#cite_note-3)
* [Al-Fakhurah Subdistrict](/wiki/Al-Fakhurah "Al-Fakhurah") (ناحية الفاخورة): population 18,357[[4]](#cite_note-4)
* [Jawbat Burghal Subdistrict](/wiki/Jawbat_Burghal "Jawbat Burghal") (ناحية جوبة برغال): population 5,743[[5]](#cite_note-5)
